Product type

A simple product maps to a single stock line (one SKU) in the catalogue.

Add at least one option (for example Colour, Size). Each option needs predefined values. Optional image URL per value shows a swatch on the storefront (D2). The SKU table lists one row per configuration; set in-stock or out-of-stock per SKU (D4).

SKU catalogue

SKU Configuration Stock
Use the copied JSON in product_detail.html block product_config_data until the API is wired.
